series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records of the service tickets logged for customers arrived/queue BMV Agencies for the services like Driver’s License, Vehicle Registrations, etc… . Data includes basic information for the customer such as name, phone number, email address and history of the event/actions on the ticket like queue timings and communications via Short Message Service (SMS) or emails. NOTE: There is no system integration between Q-flow and BASS or any other systems.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: three (3) years from date case/ticket was created; thirty (30) days customer communications, SMS and/or emails
